presets.label: Fast
presets.description: Move immediately. Make reasonable assumptions. Keep explanations minimal.

presets.label: Balanced
presets.description: Move quickly, explain tradeoffs, and ask when ambiguity actually matters.

presets.label: Strict
presets.description: Prioritize correctness. Clarify first. Push back hard on weak assumptions.

presets.label: Brutal
presets.description: Blunt, skeptical, and sharp. Truth over comfort.
